examples: We found him under a cottonwood tree in the big arroyo near sheep camp.
It was actually snowing very hard a few miles uphill toward Cottonwood Pass.
Her beloved Hank hung lifelessly from the branches of a tall cottonwood tree.
Situated along Main Street in Cottonwood, the Stronghold Wine tasting room has a lively neighbourhood feel.
Evacuations remained in effect for the Cottonwood campground and two youth probation camps along Lake Hughes Canyon Road.
